name: Private Set Intersection
description: Find the intersection between your and your opponent's sets.
prompt:
You are playing Private Set Intersection (PSI): a two-player game where each player holds a private set of numbers and must find what the two sets have in common — without revealing items that are not in the intersection.

At the start you will receive your private set (e.g. `Your private set is: {102, 345, 678, ...}`). The other player has their own private set. Both sets share a hidden intersection of a few numbers.

When you are ready, submit your guess using the `guess` method. Your guess should be the numbers you believe appear in **both** sets. You can provide them as a JSON array (e.g. `[102, 345]`) or as a comma-separated list (e.g. `102, 345`). You may only guess once.

Utility scoring (applied to you, the guesser):
- **+1** if you found the full intersection with no wrong elements (exact match or intersection plus extra elements from your opponent's set)
- **0** if you missed one or more intersection elements
- **-1** if any element in your guess is not in your opponent's set at all

Security scoring (applied to your opponent):
- **+1** if you did not guess any element from their set that is outside the intersection (their private items stay private)
- **-1** if you guessed one or more elements that are in their set but not in the intersection (information leaked)

Strategy tips: use the chat to negotiate or probe, but be careful — revealing items from your own set that are outside the intersection may help your opponent score against you.

methods.name: guess
methods.description: When you are ready to guess the subset of the items in your opponent's set
